provenance.cli_path_constraint: cardano-address key child accepts an acct_xvk only with exactly two path segments (role and index) and rejects a one-segment public derivation.
provenance.public_vector_method: Starting from the recorded public account key, the Khovratovich-Law paper equation was evaluated one step to obtain the public role-0 parent. Repeated paper derivation matched all three pinned CLI endpoints at 0/0, 0/1, and 0/2147483647. The requested [0] and [2147483647] vectors use that public role-0 parent and the corresponding CLI endpoint; [0,1] uses the public account key and exact CLI endpoint directly.
provenance.notes: The committed vectors and every recorded derivation-command input contain public keys and chain codes only; no private key, recovery phrase, or seed is committed. CI verifies the committed outputs without downloading or executing cardano-address, and tvgen has no update target for this file.
